description: A production manager needs to expedite a specific work order to meet a new customer deadline.

nodes.task_description: Locate the work order in the system and check its current status and position in the queue.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the work order and sees it is scheduled to start in two days.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the impact of changing the job's priority on other scheduled jobs.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies which other orders will be delayed if this one is expedited.

nodes.task_description: Update the priority of the work order and regenerate the schedule for the affected work center.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully increases the order's priority and confirms the new schedule.
